data.title: NextGen Digital Platforms responds to OTC Markets request about promotional activity for its common shares traded on OTCQB.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 2, 2025, NextGen Digital Platforms Inc. (CSE:NXT) (OTCQB:NXTDF) (FSE:Z12) has been instructed by OTC Markets Group Inc. to release an official statement regarding promotional efforts tied to its common shares on the OTCQB Venture Market. NextGen is a digital asset and fintech platform that connects traditional capital markets with Web3 infrastructure. The Company's common shares ("Shares") are actively traded on the OTCQB, monitored by OTC Markets.

data.title: Q3 of 2025 witnessed a significant increase in dollar-backed crypto inflows, reaching a whopping $45. Read more.
data.description: In the third quarter of 2025, there was a significant surge in the stablecoin market, as net inflows reached an impressive $45. This sudden growth highlights the increasing popularity and demand for stablecoins during this period.

data.title: Global construction industry to hit $20.44 trillion in 2029, up from $15.78 trillion in 2024 - steady growth driven by infrastructure development, renovation activities, and rising elderly population.
data.description: Dublin, (BUSINESS WIRE) - A recent report titled "Construction Market Report 2025" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The construction market has shown consistent growth, with its size increasing from $15.78 trillion in 2024 to an estimated $16.45 trillion in 2025. This growth is projected to continue at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.3%. The expansion in the historical period is credited to factors like rising infrastructure development, growth in renovation projects, rapid expansion of the elderly population, and an increase in.

data.title: 1-day training course on Oil and Gas Industry Contracts on Nov 17, 2025, to cover current developments.
data.description: A new training course, "Advanced Understanding and Drafting Oil and Gas Industry Contracts," has been included in the available options at ResearchAndMarkets.com. Scheduled for November 17, 2025, this comprehensive one-day session aims to enhance participants' knowledge of current practices and updates within the oil and gas sector. The course is designed to provide insights into the legal and regulatory aspects essential for professionals involved in handling industry contracts. Given the fast-paced and intricate nature of the oil and gas industry, this training will ensure that individuals stay informed about the latest developments, enabling them to grasp the significance of the contracts they engage with effectively.

data.title: Nutromics reveals simultaneous real-time data on vancomycin and tobramycin in animal models at IATDMCT.
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia, on October 2, 2025, Nutromics, a diagnostics company, revealed groundbreaking data showcasing the simultaneous real-time monitoring of two vital antibiotics - vancomycin and tobramycin - on a single device in animal trials. This achievement marks the first instance globally where such continuous data has been provided on these antibiotics using this method.

data.title: Ceramic Tiles Market to reach $227.8 billion by 2030, with 3.0% CAGR. Demand driven by construction and renovations, urbanization, and consumer preference for durable materials. Opportunities in eco-friendly designs, challenges in raw material prices and competition.
data.description: The Ceramic Tiles Market is expected to grow from USD 196.2 billion in 2025 to USD 227.8 billion by 2030, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 3.0%. Factors driving this growth include increasing construction and renovation activities, urbanization, and consumer demand for stylish, durable building materials. Despite challenges like fluctuating raw material prices, opportunities exist in the demand for eco-friendly and innovative tile designs. Key players in the market include Mohawk Industries Inc., Grupo Lamosa, Pamesa Ceramica, RAK Ceramics, and more. The main drivers include investments in infrastructure, with high demand in the Asia-Pacific region, while raw material price fluctuations present a significant restraint. The study also highlights the porcelain segment showing the highest growth potential in the global ceramic tiles market, with flooring accounting for a significant market share. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: FICO's Direct License Program advertised as cost-cutting is actually a price increase of at least double, claims CDIA.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, in Washington, a Direct License Program was introduced by FICO under the guise of being a cost-saving initiative. However, in truth, it has led to a marked price hike by FICO. The announcement has revealed that FICO has amplified its publicly stated prices by a minimum of two-fold.

data.title: iDENTIFY partners with 3 community banks in Tulsa to modernize data and compliance, aiming for future growth.
data.description: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, iDENTIFY has joined forces with three local community banks to update their data systems, enhance compliance measures, and ready themselves for future expansion. This partnership aims to bring about modernization and increased efficiency within the banking sector.

data.title: Dow hits record high despite shutdown risk. Nvidia's stock breaks out. CoreWeave also sees gains.
data.description: Today, stock market indexes experienced slight gains on Tuesday, with the Dow reaching a record high despite risks of a potential government shutdown. Two notable winners were CoreWeave and Nvidia stocks. Nvidia particularly stood out as it broke out during the trading session. This news was covered live by Investor's Business Daily, providing up-to-date coverage of the market trends. The positive performance of these stocks contributed to the overall upbeat atmosphere in the market today.

data.title: Pavel Durov's riches primarily come from Bitcoin investments, not Telegram. (Click for more)
data.description: Pavel Durov, the creator of Telegram, recently revealed that the majority of his wealth comes from his early investments in Bitcoin rather than from his messaging platform. This disclosure sheds light on Durov's financial background, showing that his success is largely attributed to his involvement in the cryptocurrency market. This revelation highlights the significant role that Bitcoin played in Durov's accumulation of wealth, indicating the lucrative potential of early investments in digital assets. This information underscores Durov's success in the cryptocurrency sphere and provides insight into his financial portfolio, showcasing the importance of diversification and strategic investments in emerging markets.
